$ man snapcat | grep

    License

    RawSSG is distributed under the MIT License, a permissive open‑source licence that allows you to use, modify, and share the software with minimal restrictions.

    Shortcut Keys

    • j / ↓ : scroll down
    • k / ↑ : scroll up
    • g : go to top
    • G : go to bottom
    • p : print page
    • c : toggle typewriter
    • l : toggle light theme
    • s : focus search
    • ? : show/hide this help
    • Escape : close help / clear search
